src: Black over-ear headphones with cushioned pads, adjustable headband, and a sleek, modern design. The ear cups have a circular pattern grill and a connecting wire along the band.
edit: Winter-themed headphones with one ear cup in icy blue and the other in snowy white. The headband is decorated with frost-like patterns, and the wires resemble snow chains.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object lies flat on a light wooden desk near a monitor stand, accompanied by a mouse and red pen in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object is at the bottom of an empty red plastic basket with lined ridges, surrounded by a checker-patterned surface and other items.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object hangs on a metallic door handle against a wooden door, with a poster partially visible below and a black object behind on the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object rests on a patterned red and orange cushioned surface, with a conference room visible in the background, featuring black chairs and tables.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object perches on a wooden ledge against a whiteboard with red marker writings, with a blue wall beneath the ledge.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is on a tan leather couch with visible stitching, set in a room corner with grey carpeting visible at the base.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object sits on a bright red fabric chair in a room with a grey carpet, with the back of the chair and floor creating a contrast.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object is on top of white papers on a gray desk, near an ergonomic mouse and a black pen holder filled with stationary items.
per_image_non_shared_src.8: The object rests on a white window sill with sunlight streaming in through the window panes, creating shadows against the bright glass.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object lies flat on a light wooden desk near a monitor stand, with a mouse and red pen surrounded by a winter setting of snowflakes gently falling around the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object is at the bottom of a red plastic basket with lined ridges in a wintry setting with white frost lining the ridges and items scattered with snow traces.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object hangs on a metallic door handle against a wooden door, surrounded by a wintry backdrop of frosted windows and icicles forming above.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object rests on a patterned red and orange cushioned surface, in a conference room transformed into a winter scene with snow-like textures on the chairs and tables.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object perches on a wooden ledge against a whiteboard in a wintry classroom setting with frost on the whiteboard and a snowy blue wall beneath.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is on a tan leather couch in a room corner transformed into a winter scene with a soft layer of snow on the couch and icy patterns on the floor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object sits on a bright red fabric chair in a winter setting, with snowflakes gently resting on the chair and a cool, icy atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The object is on white papers on a gray desk, in a winter atmosphere with icicles hanging from the desk's edge and snow lightly covering the stationary items.
per_image_non_shared_edit.8: The object rests on a white window sill with sunlight streaming in, surrounded by a serene winter scene of frosted window panes and snowy accents.
